title: Distant thunders
description: A realism mod that introduces speed-of-sound physics to Minecraft. Lightning strikes are no longer heard instantly; instead, the thunder reaches you with a delay based on your distance from the strike. It also features dynamic volume scaling and realistic
body:
# Distant thunders
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SeIIe1zerH0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A realism mod that introduces speed-of-sound physics to Minecraft. Lightning strikes are no longer heard instantly; instead, the thunder reaches you with a delay based on your distance from the strike. It also features dynamic volume scaling and realistic
